entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A major subsistence food crop in the Sahelian region of West Africa.

entities.name: HELIOCHEILUS ALBIPUNCTELLA
entities.description: A pest known as the millet head miner or spike worm that attacks pearl millet.

entities.name: SAHELIAN WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the research on pearl millet and its pests is conducted.

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity resulting from pest infestation.

entities.name: PLANTING PERIOD
entities.description: The timing of crop planting which influences pest infestation levels.

entities.name: RAINFALL PATTERNS
entities.description: The onset time and seasonal distribution of rains affecting the distribution of diapaused pupae.

entities.name: SOIL TYPE
entities.description: A factor that governs the distribution of larval populations of the millet head miner.

entities.name: PEST CONTROL PRACTICES
entities.description: Strategies and actions taken to manage and reduce pest infestations.

entities.name: PEST TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of certain millet cultivars to resist or tolerate attack by the millet head miner.

entities.name: CHEMICAL PESTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used to kill the millet head miner larvae.

entities.name: NATURAL ENEMIES
entities.description: Organisms that naturally prey upon or parasitize the millet head miner.

entities.name: HABROBRACON HEBETOR
entities.description: A larval ectoparasitoid used in augmentative releases to control the millet head miner.

entities.name: AUGMENTATIVE RELEASES
entities.description: The practice of releasing parasitoids into the environment to increase pest mortality.

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: A country in West Africa where augmentative release pilot projects were tested.

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country in West Africa where augmentative release pilot projects were tested.

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in West Africa where augmentative release pilot projects were tested.

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A country in West Africa where augmentative release pilot projects were tested.

entities.name: LARVAL MORTALITY
entities.description: The rate of death among the larval population of the millet head miner.
